name: Radical Cobblemon Trainers
description: Over 1500 unique and challenging trainers, from the Pokemon ROM hacks Radical Red (v3.02) and Unbound (v2.0.3.2) as well as the main series
description_pt_br: Mais de 1500 treinadores únicos e desafiadores dos ROM hacks Radical Red (v3.02) e Unbound (v2.0.3.2), além da série principal
